summary: A rectangular bunker-style structure with a dark wood plank roof featuring a stepped pyramid design. The main body consists of stonebrick walls with regular window openings, elevated on a gravel foundation platform. The building sits on a dirt/gravel base with clear symmetry and a utilitarian military aesthetic.

shape.overall_form: rectangular box with stepped pyramid roof

rebuild_hints: Build rectangular stonebrick walls approximately 12×10 blocks with 1-block thickness
Create 6 evenly-spaced window openings (2×2 glass) on the front and back walls
Construct gravel platform foundation extending 2-3 blocks beyond building perimeter
Build stepped pyramid roof using dark wood planks with 3-4 descending layers
Each roof layer steps inward by 1 block on all sides
Top roof layer is approximately 8×6 blocks, stepping down to base
Add stone or gravel base layer beneath the main structure
uncertainties: Exact window frame material (appears to be stone or stonebrick trim)
Precise roof layer heights and step dimensions
Whether interior is hollow or filled
Door location not clearly visible in any view
